tool_definitions.description: Create a wallet from a private key

tool_definitions.description: Create a mnemonic phrase

tool_definitions.name: wallet_from_mnemonic
tool_definitions.description: Create a wallet from a mnemonic phrase

tool_definitions.name: wallet_from_encrypted_json
tool_definitions.description: Create a wallet by decrypting an encrypted JSON wallet

tool_definitions.name: wallet_encrypt
tool_definitions.description: Encrypt a wallet with a password

tool_definitions.description: Get the wallet address

tool_definitions.description: Get the wallet public key

tool_definitions.description: Get the wallet private key (with appropriate security warnings)

tool_definitions.description: Get the balance of the wallet

tool_definitions.description: Get the chain ID the wallet is connected to

tool_definitions.description: Get the number of transactions sent from this account (nonce)

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_protocol_data
tool_definitions.description: Fetches TVL (Total Value Locked) data for DeFi protocols. **AUTO-RESOLUTION ENABLED:** Pass protocol names as users mention them (e.g.,

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_historical_chain_tvl
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical TVL (Total Value Locked) data for blockchain chains over time. Returns the last 10 data points showing TVL evolution. Can return data for a specific chain or aggregated data across all chains. **AUTO-RESOLUTION ENABLED:** Chain names are automatically matched (e.g.,

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_dexs_data
tool_definitions.description: Fetches DEX (decentralized exchange) trading volume data and metrics. Returns different levels of data based on parameters: specific protocol data (most detailed), chain-specific overview, or global overview (all DEXs). **AUTO-RESOLUTION ENABLED:** Protocol and chain names are automatically matched.

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_fees_and_revenue
tool_definitions.description: Fetches fees and revenue metrics for DeFi protocols. Can filter by specific protocol and/or chain. **AUTO-RESOLUTION ENABLED:** Protocol and chain names are automatically matched.

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_stablecoin
tool_definitions.description: Fetches stablecoin data including circulation and price information. Returns top 20 stablecoins

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_stablecoin_chains
tool_definitions.description: Fetches stablecoin data by chains. Returns last 3 chains with market cap data

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_stablecoin_charts
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical market cap charts for stablecoins over time. Returns the last 10 data points showing circulation, USD values, and bridged amounts. Can filter by blockchain or specific stablecoin, or show global aggregated data

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_stablecoin_prices
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical stablecoin price data. Returns last 3 data points

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_prices_current_coins
tool_definitions.description: Fetches current token prices from DefiLlama. Requires token addresses in the format chain:address (e.g.,

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_prices_first_coins
tool_definitions.description: Fetches the first recorded historical prices for specified cryptocurrency tokens. Useful for finding when a token was first listed/tracked or its initial price point

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_batch_historical
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical price data for multiple cryptocurrencies at specific timestamps. Useful for getting prices of multiple coins at the same or different points in time

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_historical_prices_by_contract
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical prices for tokens at a specific point in time using their contract addresses. Useful for getting price data at exact timestamps for analysis or backtesting

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_percentage_coins
tool_definitions.description: Fetches percentage price change for tokens over a specified time period. Calculates how much token prices changed from a starting point, either looking backward (default) or forward in time

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_chart_coins
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical price chart data for one or more cryptocurrency tokens across different blockchains. Returns time-series price data with customizable time range and data point frequency

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_latest_pool_data
tool_definitions.description: Fetches current yield farming pool data including APY rates, TVL, and rewards. Returns a list of pools that can be filtered and sorted by various metrics

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_historical_pool_data
tool_definitions.description: Fetches historical APY and TVL data for a specific yield farming pool over time. Returns the last 10 data points showing how the pool

tool_definitions.name: defillama_get_options_data
tool_definitions.description: Fetches options protocol data including trading volume and premium metrics. Returns different levels of data: specific protocol data (most detailed), chain-specific overview, or global overview (all options protocols). **AUTO-RESOLUTION ENABLED:** Protocol and chain names are automatically matched.
